welcome: Cloudstream → Telegram bridge Commands: /asia query – search Asia2TV /anime query – search AnimeWitcher /lang – change the interface language /menu – open the main menu /help – show this message
no_servers: No servers were published for this episode.
language_prompt: Pick a language / اختر اللغة / Choisissez la langue:
send_all_confirm: About to send {count} episodes as videos. This may take a while. Continue?
extract_unsupported: This server type isn't supported for direct upload. Use the link instead.
extract_failed: Couldn't fetch the video. Falling back to the URL: {url}
extract_too_large: File is {size_mb} MB — larger than Telegram's 50 MB Bot API cap. Sending the link instead: {url}
